title: ReviewTraceLine
description: Canonical shape for one line of briefs/<task>-review-trace.jsonl (spec: specs/r5-trace-enforcement.md FR-160/161) — self-reported evidence that one reviewer tool invocation (scope-gate, normalizer, specialist, cross-runtime corroboration) occurred, appended before its result is used or reported. Validated by the hand-rolled interpreter in scripts/lib/review/finding-schema.js (D-4, zero-dep) which supports only: type, enum, required, properties, additionalProperties, items — any other keyword makes the interpreter throw rather than silently ignore it.
